# V50 · From Loop to RSI · Sovereign Governance

V50 adds `/loop-to-rsi-sovereign-governance.html`, the next public demonstration. It shows how a long-running agent loop becomes deterministic RSI governance only when replay, Evidence Contact Index discipline, baselines, stress tests, dossiers, and mechanical gates decide what may improve.

## Added

- `site/loop-to-rsi-sovereign-governance.html`
- `site/assets/loop-to-rsi-sovereign-governance.css`
- `site/assets/loop-to-rsi-sovereign-governance.js`
- `data/loop-to-rsi-sovereign-governance-demo.json`
- `schemas/loop-to-rsi-sovereign-governance.schema.json`
- `tests/loop-to-rsi-sovereign-governance.test.mjs`
- `tools/loop-to-rsi-sovereign-governance-v50-kernel.mjs`

## Public-safe posture

No account, form, wallet, token approval, network request, analytics, cookies, browser storage, transaction broadcast, production authority, or user data collection is introduced.
